docs: Constructor
constructors.label: new

docs: Grant a role to an account (owner only)
messages.label: grant_role

docs: Revoke a role from an account (owner only)
messages.label: revoke_role

docs: Check if an account has a specific role
messages.label: has_role

docs: Add a new token to the registry with automatic tier calculation.
Blocked when contract is paused.
messages.label: add_token

docs: Update token balance and investment data with automatic tier recalculation.
Blocked when contract is paused.
messages.label: update_token

docs: Remove a token from the registry.
Blocked when contract is paused.
messages.label: remove_token

docs: Calculate tier for a token based on market cap and volume
messages.label: calculate_token_tier

docs: Manually update tier for a specific token (owner only)
messages.label: update_token_tier

docs: Emergency tier override - bypasses grace period (owner only).
Reason parameter is truncated to MAX_REASON_LENGTH.
messages.label: emergency_tier_override

docs: Emergency tier override to calculated tier - bypasses grace period (owner only)
Reason parameter is truncated to MAX_REASON_LENGTH.
messages.label: emergency_tier_override_to_calculated

docs: Clear pending tier change (owner only)
messages.label: clear_pending_tier_change

docs: Set grace period duration (owner only)
messages.label: set_grace_period

docs: Get current grace period duration in milliseconds
messages.label: get_grace_period

docs: Get grace period duration in days (for convenience)
messages.label: get_grace_period_days

docs: Get grace period duration in hours (for convenience)
messages.label: get_grace_period_hours

docs: Get grace period limits (min/max allowed)
messages.label: get_grace_period_limits

docs: Calculate grace period end time for a token
messages.label: get_grace_period_end_time

docs: Check how much time is left in grace period for a token
messages.label: get_grace_period_remaining

docs: Check if grace period has expired for a token
messages.label: is_grace_period_expired

docs: Batch update tiers for tokens with pagination.
Returns number of tokens updated in this batch.
messages.label: refresh_all_tiers

docs: Paginated version of refresh_all_tiers.
`offset`: number of token IDs to skip from the start (0-based),
`limit`: maximum number of token IDs to process.
messages.label: refresh_tiers_paginated

docs: Process tokens with expired grace periods (updated to use dynamic grace period)
messages.label: process_grace_periods

docs: Paginated grace-period processing.
`offset`: number of token IDs to skip from the start (0-based),
`limit`: maximum number of token IDs to scan.
messages.label: process_grace_periods_paginated

docs: Get current distribution of tokens across tiers
messages.label: get_tier_distribution

docs: Check if 80% rule should trigger tier shift
messages.label: should_shift_tier

docs: Execute tier shift (automatic or manual)
Manual tier shift - owner only
Reason parameter is truncated to MAX_REASON_LENGTH.
messages.label: shift_active_tier

docs: Set DOT/USD oracle contract (owner only)
messages.label: set_dot_usd_oracle

docs: Get current DOT/USD oracle contract
messages.label: get_dot_usd_oracle

docs: Update tier thresholds in USD (owner only)
messages.label: set_tier_thresholds

docs: Get current tier thresholds
messages.label: get_tier_thresholds

docs: Get current active tier
messages.label: get_active_tier

docs: Get last tier change timestamp
messages.label: get_last_tier_change

docs: Get current USD to plancks conversion rate from oracle
messages.label: get_current_usd_rate

docs: Get enhanced token data with tier information
messages.label: get_enhanced_token_data

docs: Get token data with live oracle prices (backward compatibility)
messages.label: get_token_data

docs: Get tokens by tier with pagination.
Returns up to `limit` tokens starting from `offset`.
messages.label: get_tokens_by_tier

docs: Paginated version of get_tokens_by_tier.
messages.label: get_tokens_by_tier_paginated

docs: Get tokens with pending tier changes
messages.label: get_tokens_with_pending_changes

docs: Get total number of active registered tokens.
messages.label: get_token_count

docs: Get the highest token ID ever assigned (for iteration purposes).
messages.label: get_max_token_id

docs: Get the owner
messages.label: get_owner

docs: Get pending owner (if any).
messages.label: get_pending_owner

docs: Propose ownership transfer (current owner only).
Initiates the two-step ownership transfer process.
messages.label: propose_ownership_transfer

docs: Accept ownership transfer (pending owner only).
Completes the two-step ownership transfer process.
messages.label: accept_ownership

docs: Cancel pending ownership transfer (current owner only).
messages.label: cancel_ownership_transfer

docs: Check if a token exists
messages.label: token_exists

docs: Get basic token data without oracle calls (backward compatibility)
messages.label: get_basic_token_data

docs: Get token ID by token contract address
messages.label: get_token_id_by_contract

docs: Set portfolio contract (owner only)
messages.label: set_portfolio_contract

docs: Set staking contract (owner only)
messages.label: set_staking_contract

docs: Get portfolio contract
messages.label: get_portfolio_contract

docs: Get staking contract
messages.label: get_staking_contract

docs: Check if monthly rebalancing is due.
messages.label: is_rebalancing_due

docs: Trigger monthly rebalancing in Portfolio contract.
messages.label: trigger_monthly_rebalancing

docs: Trigger weekly snapshot in Portfolio contract.
messages.label: trigger_weekly_snapshot

docs: Trigger zombie stake cleanup in Staking contract.
messages.label: trigger_zombie_cleanup

docs: Execute full monthly maintenance cycle.
messages.label: execute_monthly_maintenance

docs: Set rebalancing interval (owner only).
If interval is significantly shortened, resets last trigger to allow immediate rebalance.
messages.label: set_rebalancing_interval

docs: Get last rebalancing trigger timestamp.
messages.label: get_last_rebalancing_trigger

docs: Validate that a weight is within valid range (0-10000 basis points).
messages.label: validate_weight

docs: Validate that a set of weights sum to exactly 100% (10000 basis points).
messages.label: validate_weights_sum

docs: Validate weight for a token update.
Returns error description if invalid, None if valid.
messages.label: check_weight_validity
